## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new Content Managers and review the simulation assignment for GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Assignment due end of next week; no immediate time pressure](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Focus on first principles thinking and delegation skills for the simulation](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Aim to flex brand voice, pushing edges while maintaining essence](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Document thought processes, but prioritize flow and experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Matthew Panzarino: Chief Content Officer, 15 years editorial experience (10 as TechCrunch EIC)](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli: Expert in building high-ROI brand publications](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Assignment Overview

  - [Simulate building a publication for a potential customer](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Apply first principles thinking: deeply understand company, audience, market gap](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Create unique editorial angle and voice that stands out](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Document process, but focus on flow and final product](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Key Skills to Develop

  - [First Principles Thinking: Decompose tasks, understand core elements](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Delegation: Clearly explain context and steps (applies to AI delegation)](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Extensive reading and curation of good writing examples](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Voice and Tone Guidance

  - [Flex brand voice, push edges while maintaining company essence](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Aim for "edgy" initially; client can pull back if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Capture and communicate brand essence through editorial style](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Example: Write "sharp" content for busy VPs, get to the point quickly](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Tools and Documentation

  - [Use shared ChatGPT (TeamPodA) and Perplexity accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Document thought processes, but prioritize flow and experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Provide feedback on gaps in current tooling](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Begin working on simulation assignment, due end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Continue watching onboarding videos and completing journal tasks](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Ask questions and provide feedback in Slack onboarding channel](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Use shared AI tool accounts; report any access issues](https://fathom.video/share/Hx5pEM4iHZFdwfonvJMpRFQjJ6dyMbMo?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
